column6: Dawit is a seasoned senior broker with over a decade of experience in Ethiopian financial markets, specializing in institutional investors and high-value equity.
Sara focuses on agriculture and energy listings with a disciplined approach to liquidity and execution for growth-oriented portfolios.
Abel brings deep telecom and technology sector coverage with experience coordinating block trades for family offices and regional funds.
Betelhem supports retail and banking sector clients with transparent pricing and structured execution for medium-sized equity positions.
Yared advises on cross-border interest with emphasis on manufacturing exporters and working-capital aware equity strategies.
Meron combines real estate-linked equities with traditional banking flows for diversified institutional portfolios in Addis Ababa.
Kidus is a veteran operator with selective availability and a focus on telecom infrastructure and large-cap defensive names.
Helen specializes in agriculture and consumer staples with a collaborative style suited to first-time institutional equity participants.
